checks.name: correctness
checks.description: Code compiles, logic is correct, no runtime errors

checks.name: completeness
checks.description: All acceptance criteria from handoff are met

checks.name: regressions
checks.description: Existing tests still pass, no broken functionality

checks.name: duplication
checks.description: No duplicate files, logic, schemas, or responsibilities introduced

checks.name: contracts
checks.description: All JSON artifacts conform to their schemas

checks.name: tests
checks.description: New behavior has tests, coverage not decreased

checks.name: runnability
checks.description: Project starts and serves requests successfully

checks.name: documentation
checks.description: Public APIs documented, meaningful commit messages

scoring: Sum of (check.passed ? check.weight : 0) * 100. Compare against thresholds.
